# browser-fullscreen

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Native browser fullscreen (Fullscreen API) control: useBrowserFullscreen() reactive state plus request/exit/toggle helpers.
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps/surface/floating`, `apps/surface/solo`, `fullscreen`
- Web:
  - Exports: Values: `exitBrowserFullscreen`, `isBrowserFullscreen`, `requestBrowserFullscreen`, `toggleBrowserFullscreen`, `useBrowserFullscreen`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
